post.description: Creates a new user account and returns an access token.
Authenticates a user with email and password and returns an access token.
Sends a one-time passcode to the user's email to initiate the password reset flow.
Validates the OTP sent to the user's email and returns a password-reset token.
Sets a new password using the reset token obtained after OTP verification.

get.description: Returns the profile details of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Updates the profile information for the authenticated user.
Changes the authenticated user's password after verifying the current one.
Revokes the current access token and ends the authenticated session.
Enables or disables a user account. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of application settings. Requires admin privileges.

put.description: Bulk-updates application settings using a key-value payload. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all available countries. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters.
Returns all translation key-value pairs for the given locale.
Returns a paginated list of in-app notifications for the authenticated user.

post.description: Marks all or specific notifications as read for the authenticated user.
Registers or updates the OneSignal player ID for the authenticated user's device.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the specified media file belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a time-limited signed URL that can be used for direct file uploads to storage.

get.summary: Handles the OAuth2 callback and retrieves the required file for the redirect

id.description: The unique identifier of the country.

name.description: The full name of the country.

currency.description: The currency code for the country (e.g. USD).

icon.description: URL or path to the country flag icon.

status.description: Active/inactive status of the country record.

id.description: The unique identifier of the media file.

disk.description: The storage disk where the file is stored (e.g. local, s3).

directory.description: The directory path within the disk.

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the file.

aggregate_type.description: The aggregate type category (e.g. image, video, document).

url.description: The public URL to access the file.

cdn_url.description: The CDN URL for the file, if CDN is enabled.

id.description: The unique UUID of the notification.

user_id.description: The ID of the recipient user.

sent_by.description: The ID of the user who triggered the notification.

notifiable_type.description: The class name of the related notifiable entity.

notifiable_id.description: The ID of the related notifiable entity.

data.description: Additional structured data attached to the notification.

read_at.description: Timestamp when the notification was read, or null if unread.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the notification was created.

id.description: The unique identifier of the setting.

key.description: The unique setting key used to reference this setting.

value.description: The value stored for this setting.

collection.description: The collection/group this setting belongs to.

is_public.description: Whether this setting is publicly accessible without authentication.

updated_by.description: The ID of the user who last updated this setting.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

name.description: The full display name of the user.

display_status.description: Human-readable label for the account status.

display_mobile_no.description: Mobile number with country code prefix.

email_verified_at.description: Timestamp when the email was verified.

last_login_at.description: Timestamp of the user's last login.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

id.description: The unique identifier of the device record.

user_id.description: The ID of the owning user.

onesignal_player_id.description: The OneSignal player ID for push notifications.

device_type.description: The type of device (e.g. ios, android, web).

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
